command_summary: pi 0.80.3 isolated with --no-extensions --no-context-files, read-only tools, deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro, high thinking, explicit installed design-craft 0.5.0, and the exact benchmark prompt; final response normalized only for trailing whitespace

style_authority.note: Preserved the calm enterprise console, token authority, and operator triage job.

reference_selection.note: Used relevant dashboard, taste, design-move, surface, and validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Replaced card soup, decoration, and generic tips with an operations decision surface.

evidence_level.note: Labeled L0 prose evidence and applied an explicit anti-inflation score boundary.

verified_boundary.note: Clearly separated prompt facts from unverified token, table, state, responsive, and accessibility behavior.

design_moves.note: Delivered lead metric, compact strip, exception queue, diagnostic chart, task-first table, and state moves, with a few inferred details.

scope_control.note: Stayed read-only and dashboard-focused, though it introduced some speculative table structure and remained longer than necessary.
